title: Baderke 12 Sets 5 oz Mini Glass Bottle with Cork Lids Small Decorative Jar Glass Potion Bottles Ball Shaped Round Bottles with Tags, Ropes and Funnels for DIY Crafts Wedding Birthday Party Favor Gift
description:
About this item

Sufficient Quantity: our package of 12 glass bottles with lids, a 5.47 yd long hemp rope, and some tags, assure that you'll have enough to go around; Whether it's for crafting, gifting, or decoration, these small glass jars with corks have got you covered
Unleash Your Creativity: think outside the box with our multifunctional glass bottles; Not just glass bottles with lids, these jars can be turned into potion bottles, vases, or be applied in fun DIY crafts
